emails.subject: Hi Sweetie...
emails.body: Hi Sweetie... how are you doing baby? just wanted to make sure your day was going well...

emails.subject: RE: Hi Sweetie...
emails.body: RE: Hi Sweetie... oh it is going great. so great to hear from you. how is everything at the top of the building? To: Lenhart, Matthew

emails.subject: RE: Hi Sweetie...
emails.body: you have missed me, haven't you? aren't you glad that we were able to see past our differences and continue building our relationship To: Gillette, Lisa

emails.subject: RE: Hi Sweetie...
emails.body: i know that when you get really mad at me it is only b/c you care..................so......................much To: Lenhart, Matthew
